title: An Adventurer's Delight
description: This mod aims to add many new structures to the vanilla game, ranging in difficulty, and adding a spark of freshness to Minecraft's exploration.
body:
As of now, only one structure has been added, with many new ones being developed for future updates. Currently, the sole structure available is the Samurai Temple found in the Cherry Blossom biome.

 

Installation Requirements:
 NeoForge:

 About:
In the Samurai Temple, players can explore a large underground dungeon where they can find a new armor set, a new armor-trim and weapons.

The armor concludes a complete Samurai set, accompanied by a new sword and shuriken, featuring custom enchantments.

 

Enchantments:
Homing:
The shuriken features an aim assist enchantment, enhancing precision and accuracy for the projectile weapon.

Potential Energy:
The Potential Energy enchantment operates like the Power enchantment for bows, increasing attack damage. It supports levels 1 to 5, offering incremental boosts in damage output.
